# Security Policy

We take the security of SaveTo seriously. If you believe you have found a security vulnerability, please follow the guidelines below to report it to us responsibly.

## Supported Versions

Only the latest release version of SaveTo is actively supported with security updates.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| >= 1.1  | Yes       |
| < 1.1   | No        |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Do not open a public issue on GitHub for security vulnerabilities.**

Instead, please report any security vulnerabilities by emailing us at **[sudopydev@gmail.com](mailto:sudopydev@gmail.com)**.

Please include the following information in your email:
- A description of the vulnerability and its potential impact.
- Detailed step-by-step instructions to reproduce the issue.
- Any proof of concept (PoC) code or screenshots if applicable.
- The build flavor/version (FOSS, Google Play) and Android API levels tested.

We will acknowledge receipt of your report within 48 hours and work with you to resolve the issue as quickly as possible.
